product.title: Prime Prometics Color Changing Foundation for Mature Women – Instantly Adapts to Your Skin Tone – Buildable Light-to-Medium Coverage – 12-Hour Wear – Natural Dewy Finish – Hypoallergenic
featureBullets: Prime Prometics Color Changing Foundation – The first-of-its-kind formula that instantly adapts to your unique skin tone, covering without emphasizing fine lines for seamless, natural-looking wear.
Self-Adjusting Shade Technology – White-to-beige pigments morph as you blend, ensuring a perfect color match for fair to medium tones every time.
Buildable Light-to-Medium Coverage – Effortlessly conceals spots, redness, and discoloration while staying breathable and never caking, masking, or settling into wrinkles.
Long-Lasting, Comfortable Wear – Enjoy over 12 hours of smooth, flawless coverage that won’t pill or cling to dry patches, keeping skin even and fresh all day.
Botanical Hydration Complex – Infused with Niacinamide, Bisabolol, Jojoba Oil, and Squalane to brighten, soothe, and replenish irritation-prone mature skin, hypoallergenic and dermatologist-approved.

specification.value: Anti-Redness, Color Correction, Corrects Imperfections, Hypoallergenic, Moisturizing, Smoothening
#1,539 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #18 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation matches their skin tone well and provides good coverage for everyday use, with a lovely matte finish that makes their face look flawless and younger. The product works effectively and receives positive feedback for its quality. The color-changing feature receives mixed reviews - while some say it matches their skin tone effectively, others report it turning their face orange. Customers disagree on the product's weight, with some finding it incredibly light while others say it's heavier than expected. The skin compatibility aspect also receives mixed feedback, with some finding it very nice for mature skin while others note it makes their face look oily.

reviews.reviewTitle: After u put on your face cream?
reviews.reviewText: This awesome for 40 years and up! I'm 65 years old and I don't have time for marlarkie of trying to find right color for my skin! This is perfect, it matches any skin tone and looks so natural! My BFF is Jamaican and after trying it went bought same one! (I'm Sicilian and làdys it really works on any skin tone! 😉😍
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Great coverage. Looks natural. Doesn't crease.
reviews.reviewText: I love this color changing foundation. It blends perfectly and matches my natural skin tone amazingly. It stays on pretty much all day, although i do use Hydro Grip Set and Refresh spray, which i think helps a lot. Sometimes i have to touch up the mouth/chin area a little, but overall, very pleased with this foundation.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love this foundation. It’s strange how it comes out white then turns the perfect color to match my skin. I am so happy I tried it. I told my mother in law about it and she ordered it along with a lot of other Prime products and said she is a new woman! I put a pea sized amount on my finger, rub it between my finger tips then apply it to my whole face and down my neck. I blend it with a foundation brush after I rub it in and top with a little powder. The end result is very good coverage but not cakey. It blends so well with my skin. You should definitely try it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I LOVE the way this foundation feels. It goes on easily, very soft and smooth. Sadly, it is not a true match to my complexion. I have a light/fair complexion and this gets so dark. I have tried using just a little amount and it still gets too dark.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 6, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: High end product for a great price!
reviews.reviewText: Love this foundation. I have already got two of the girls at work using it.Im 53 and it does not feel heavy or caking and it blends so well. The color some how is a automatic match to your skin. It last for ever. I will continue to buy this brand. I have also bought eyeliner, also a very good product. I bought a few months ago and still the bottle is half full and I'm using everyday.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I was skeptical. I have rosacea and I'm a senior. I don't want to look too "made up". I wondered if this would cover without being thick and cakey. Would it irritate my skin? With low expectations I tried it once, twice, three times. MAGIC! No irritation, great coverage, matched my complection. I'm a fan. Thank you!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Great make up. It actually is color changing, much to my surprise. Looks good with no greasy feeling. Unfortunately for me i have very sensative eyes and had too return it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Does change to match skin tone, unhealthy chemicals
reviews.reviewText: Does blend in to match your skin tone. Was not happy to run it through the YUKA app for its ingredients to find that is full of unhealthy chemicals. Other than that it does work nicely without settling in your lines.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I wish I’d discovered this product years ago as would have saved me a fortune in constantly buying foundations that were never the right colour for my skin! The Prime Prometics colour changing cream goes on easily to the skin and magically changes to suit my colouring. It gives good coverage too. Fantastic product.

Will not waste my money on any other foundation. Love it!! Great for mature skin. Goes on beautifully. Gives me such a nice glow and coverage. Color match is spot on. Finally found a foundation that’s just amazing for me. Also received compliments on how flawless my skin looks. Will absolutely buy again. Great product.

reviews.reviewTitle: Excellent product - try it & find out for yourself
reviews.reviewText: Excellent product. Leaves mature skin feeling & looking hydrated & not caked & dull. Lasts all day too, tbh i was really sceptical about this product but now, after using it i would highly recommend to anyone 'of a certain age' who's struggling with dried-out, dull looking skin to give this a go.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I was extremely skeptical as to the skintone colour matching, but OMG this foundation is amazing. Im 67 years old and cant believe I never have to colour match a foundation to my skin again. Fully recommend it.

Well this is a game changer!! I definitely do not normally spend this much on make up. However, sitting between being in denial about my age and stage of life (51 😬) and still feeling very young, I have accepted that I do have to consider different cosmetics as my skin and hair changes (they did not get the memo that I still feel young😆) So I went for it. 1. The excitement of the ‘magic’ of changing from white to my skin tone will remain for every application! 2. It feels lovely on - light, but enough coverage to give a smooth even cover. 3. I think it looks really nice 4. Hopefully I will feel it’s good value for money with it lasting for a reasonable time frame 🤞🏻
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 8, 2026
